title: Fix cloud/worker test suite crash (workerd + Node 24)
description:
pnpm test in cloud/worker crashes before any test runs: workerd ERR_RUNTIME_FAILURE 'inserted row already exists in table' (error points into the generated runtime, line ~10840). Verified present on main and epic/idc on 2026-06-10 — pre-existing, unrelated to recent worker changes. Likely a miniflare/vitest-pool-workers version incompatibility with Node 24. Effect: all worker-side tests are unverifiable, including the tick_operation actor-propagation test in cloud/worker/test/project-room-sync.test.ts.

Approach: reproduce with 'cd cloud/worker && pnpm test'; check @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers / miniflare / wrangler versions against their Node-24 support matrices; upgrade the test tooling (allowed to touch package.json/pnpm-lock.yaml for cloud/worker only) or pin the vitest pool to a working combination. Do NOT mock around it.

Run: cd cloud/worker && pnpm test
notes: 2026-06-10 19:25 - Final epic-idc review surfaced two more pre-existing worker-test problems, related to this tick: (1) cloud/worker/test/auth-integration.test.ts has 2 failing 'Agent WebSocket Auth' tests even when run alone — they hit /agent, a route that no longer exists in cloud/worker/src/index.ts; tests are stale. (2) Worker tests are not in CI at all (.github/workflows/ci.yml runs Go + UI only), which is why both this and the workerd boot crash went unnoticed. Consider folding CI coverage into the fix.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test in cloud/worker runs to completion with all tests executing (existing + actor-propagation test passing)
